metadata.description: One command to forge self-evolving Claude Code skills. They learn from your corrections, detect when they go stale, and propose their own updates.

plugins.name: claude-skill-evo
plugins.description: Scans your project, asks smart questions, and forges a complete skill system tailored to your tech stack — with built-in self-evolution. Every skill learns from corrections, detects staleness, and proposes updates. Run /skill-evo once to initialize, run it again to improve. Supports 16 skill types across 7 languages.
